examples: I'll run a diagnostic test to see why the server keeps crashing.
Intelligent computers will soon be an indispensable diagnostic tool for every doctor.
Consequently, even though the machine is expensive, a dermatological clinic in Westville is considering buying one to reduce diagnostic costs.
The machine is not the issue and the tool makers are simply not diagnostic specialists.
In the works: tests for kidney injury and sepsis, and a heart attack diagnostic test.
